sections.paragraph:
Original: עשׂה

Transliteration: ‛âśâh

Phonetic: aw-saw'

BDB Definition:

  1. to do, fashion, accomplish, make
    1. (Qal)
      1. to do, work, make, produce
        1. to do
        2. to work
        3. to deal (with)
        4. to act, act with effect, effect
      2. to make
        1. to make
        2. to produce
        3. to prepare
        4. to make (an offering)
        5. to attend to, put in order
        6. to observe, celebrate
        7. to acquire (property)
        8. to appoint, ordain, institute
        9. to bring about
        10. to use
        11. to spend, pass
    2. (Niphal)
      1. to be done
      2. to be made
      3. to be produced
      4. to be offered
      5. to be observed
      6. to be used
    3. (Pual) to be made
  2. (Piel) to press, squeeze

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 1708,1709

Part(s) of speech: Verb
